expectations.text: Installs Ruby via rbenv/asdf/mise â€” does NOT recommend system Ruby
expectations.evidence: `Do not use system Ruby. Use rbenv:` with `brew install rbenv ruby-build` and `rbenv install 3.4.8`

expectations.text: Gemfile includes a docs-appropriate theme (e.g., just-the-docs) that supports sidebar nav and light/dark
Workflow gives `actions/configure-pages` step an `id: pages` so `steps.pages.outputs.base_path` resolves
Workflow sets `JEKYLL_ENV=production` on the build step
expectations.evidence: `env:\n  JEKYLL_ENV: production` on both test and deploy build steps

expectations.text: Workflow has an htmlproofer step that runs against `_site` and fails on broken internal links
expectations.evidence: `bundle exec htmlproofer ./_site` with flags that exit non-zero on broken links

expectations.text: htmlproofer step is scoped to internal links (e.g., `--disable-external`) to keep PR checks fast and stable
Uses current major versions: actions/checkout@v4, ruby/setup-ruby@v1, actions/configure-pages@v5, actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3, actions/deploy-pages@v4
Build step passes `--baseurl` from `${{ steps.pages.outputs.base_path }}` (or equivalent)
